summary: R4 is fully implemented. App.tsx contains no RunningToolProgressIndicator definition, no JSX usage, no RunningToolProgress import, and no transcript.runningToolProgress read. message-adapter.ts contains no RunningToolProgress interface/type export, no runningToolProgress field on AdaptedTranscript, no Map construction, no tool_progress capture branch, and no runningToolProgress key in the return object. Both parity test files exist and exhaustively cover every required behavior plus all four edge cases (active-stream UI via streamingToolUses, no other consumers in runtime/src, TS build cleanliness, executable absence-check). The R1 regression guard (streamingToolUses={transcript.streamingToolUses} on <Messages>) is wired at App.tsx:221. Upstream OpenClaude (/home/tetsuo/git/openclaude/src) was confirmed to contain no RunningToolProgressIndicator or runningToolProgress symbol, so strict-parity-by-absence is the correct contract. All 12 tests pass via the row's command invocation. APPROVED.
